Tic-Tac-Toe

Play Tic-Tac-Toe against the AI. X goes first. Can you beat the computer? Track your wins, losses, and draws.

Your turn (X)
0You
0Draws
0AI

Complete the game to see your score!

How to Play Tic-Tac-Toe

1

You play as X and go first. Click any empty cell.

2

The AI responds as O. Take turns placing your marks.

3

Get three in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — to win.

4

Your score is tracked across games. Click New Game to play again.

Tips to Improve Your Score

  • Take the center square on your first move for the best position
  • If you control the center, take corners to create multiple threats
  • Watch for the AI setting up two-in-a-row — block it immediately
  • Create a fork: two ways to win on your next move

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you beat the AI?

The AI uses a strategy that makes it hard to beat but not impossible. It prioritizes winning moves and blocking yours. With perfect play from both sides, Tic-Tac-Toe always ends in a draw.

Who goes first?

You (X) always go first. The AI plays as O. This gives you the advantage — use it wisely!

About the Tic-Tac-Toe

The Tic-Tac-Toe is one of our most popular brain training exercises. Designed to test and improve your cognitive abilities, this game provides instant feedback on your performance.

Regular practice with this type of cognitive exercise can help improve your mental processing speed, accuracy, and overall brain health. We recommend practicing for 10-15 minutes daily for the best results.

Your scores are saved locally on your device, allowing you to track your progress over time. Challenge yourself to beat your personal best with each attempt!
